   <media:title>The Famous Farm Show Milkshake is Worth the Wait</media:title>
   <media:content url="https://www.youtube.com/v/GjZ1by7Q-HQ?version=3" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="640" height="390"/>

   <media:description>Each year, the Pennsylvania Dairymen’s Association serves up thousands of gallons of milkshakes at the PA Farm Show, and people wait in long lines to get a taste.

Reporter Asha Prihar went behind the scenes at this year's show to see how it all works.

   <media:description>On six acres in western PA, Hope Haven Farm Sanctuary nurtures rescued goats, pigs, horses, and more — all thanks to local hero Karen Phillips.

  <id>yt:video:kOVFUzrKX2Y</id>

  <title>2026 PA Governor Race: Shapiro Launches Reelection Campaign</title>
  <link rel="alternate" href="https://www.youtube.com/shorts/kOVFUzrKX2Y"/>
  <author>
   <name>Spotlight PA</name>
   <uri>https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2RdIuNJ3E2kAELpxo1sFPg</uri>
  </author>
  <published>2026-01-09T17:16:46+00:00</published>
  <updated>2026-02-09T14:42:04+00:00</updated>

   <media:title>2026 PA Governor Race: Shapiro Launches Reelection Campaign</media:title>
   <media:content url="https://www.youtube.com/v/kOVFUzrKX2Y?version=3" type="application/x-shockwave-flash" width="640" height="390"/>

   <media:description>Gov. Josh Shapiro kicks off his 2026 Pennsylvania reelection campaign in Pittsburgh and Philly as Republican state Treasurer Stacy Garrity lines up to challenge him, setting the stage for a high‑stakes governor’s race.
